steps.title: Identify the contradiction in Text 2
steps.content: Text 1 predicts extinction for populations losing sea ice to warming. Text 2 describes Svalbard polar bears experiencing rapid sea-ice decline yet remaining stable and well-nourished—by adapting their diet to include reindeer and eggs.

steps.title: Match Text 2's implicit response
steps.content:
A names the flaw precisely: the conclusion overlooked the possibility of adaptation.
  • B disputes ice-loss rates (which Text 2 doesn't challenge)
  • C wrongly claims Svalbard is unaffected (despite rapidly declining ice)
  • D frames the issue unclearly
.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
